articles.title: Daughter runs Boston Marathon to honor dad with rare vision disorder
articles.description:
Virginia runner London Tuma is racing for Mass Eye and Ear after her father’s Usher syndrome diagnosis changed their lifelong running bond.

The post Daughter runs Boston Marathon to honor dad with rare vision disorder appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Virginia runner London Tuma races in Boston Marathon to honor her father.
Tuma's father has Usher syndrome, a rare vision disorder affecting their running bond.
Funds raised will support Mass Eye and Ear's research and treatment efforts.
